name: Alan Brooke
longDesc: Chef de l'état-major impérial britannique, Alan Brooke est le principal conseiller militaire de Churchill et architecte stratégique de la victoire alliée en Europe. Carte WC4 artillerie tier-S or : bonus planification et portée, meilleure artillerie britannique du jeu.

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by 12% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

skills.name: Accuracy
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding artillery units

skills.name: Retaliation
skills.desc: When friendly troops within 1 grid around you are killed in battle, you will gain the Vengeance status, with attack +18 for 2 turns.

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Chief of the Imperial General Staff, Alan Brooke was Churchill's principal military adviser and strategic architect of the Allied victory in Europe. A WC4 tier-S gold artillery card with planning and range bonuses — the best British artillery in the game.
longDescDe: Alan Brooke, Chief of the Imperial General Staff, war Churchills wichtigster militärischer Berater und strategischer Architekt des alliierten Sieges in Europa. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Artilleriekarte mit Planungs- und Reichweitenboni — die beste britische Artillerie im Spiel.
